title: Guardians of the Galaxy 3 將沿用James Gunn劇本 據聞情節催淚

replies.msg:
Avengers Endgame: James Gunn’s Guardians of the Galaxy 3 script leaves readers in TEARS
https://www.express.co.uk/entertainment/films/1061024/Guardians-of-the-Galaxy-Vol-3-script-James-Gunn-Avengers-Endgame-Sean-Gunn
呢篇話James Gunn個細路Sean Gunn話disney仲想整Gotg 3
但睇個勢disney應該唔會請番james Gunn


Marvel Approached Adam McKay About Directing Guardians Of The Galaxy 3
https://www.denofgeek.com/us/movies/marvel/278277/guardians-of-the-galaxy-3-adam-mckay-has-talked-to-kevin-feige-about-directing
呢一篇傳佢地會揾Adam KcKay
我唔係好識佢
但我覺得James Gunn果種風格好難有人代替到

有無人討論下end game 後發展
下一個phrase 只係期待gotg 質素有保證
